response: The serum and FF levels of 25OH-VD, as well as the FF levels of TNF-α and TAC, were determined using enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA) kits according to the manufacturer's guidelines. These measurements were performed using a 96 well microplate ELISA reader (Dynatech. MR 7000). The 25-OHVD levels in human serum were assessed using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab213966, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) employing a quantitative sandwich enzyme immunoassay technique (16). The TNF-α levels in human serum were measured using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab46087, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) with the same technique (17). The TAC levels in human serum were determined using an ELISA kit (catalog no. ab65329, Abcam Inc., San Francisco, USA) with the same technique (18).
